ddls:
CREATE TABLE "formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the format */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the format */,
  "is_digital" INTEGER /* Indicates if the format is digital */,
  "is_physical" INTEGER /* Indicates if the format is physical */,
  "file_extension" TEXT /* File extension for digital formats */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "format_categories" (
  "format_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each format category */,
  "format_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the format category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the format category */,
  "is_physical" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category includes physical formats */,
  "is_digital" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category includes digital formats */,
  "category_order" INTEGER /* Order in which categories should be displayed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "publisher_name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the publisher */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the publisher */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the publisher */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the publisher */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the publisher */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the publisher is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage event */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being used */,
  "patron_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patron using the resource */,
  "usage_type" TEXT /* Type of usage (e.g., checkout, reservation, return) */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date the resource was used */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the resource was returned (if applicable) */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the library branch where the usage occurred */,
  "usage_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the usage */,
  "renewal_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the resource has been renewed */,
  "is_overdue" INTEGER /* Indicates if the resource is overdue */,
  "late_fee" TEXT /* Amount of late fee charged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_usage_patron_id FOREIGN KEY ("patron_id") REFERENCES patrons ("patron_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patrons" (
  "patron_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patron */,
  "patron_name" TEXT /* Full name of the patron */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patron */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the patron */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patron */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the patron registered */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the patron (e.g., adult, child, staff) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patron */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patron */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the patron's account is active */,
  "account_expiry_date" TEXT /* Date when the patron's account expires */,
  "preferred_branch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preferred library branch for the patron */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patron_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being reviewed */,
  "patron_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patron who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the patron */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., approved, pending, rejected) */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* ID of the librarian who approved the review */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_patron_id FOREIGN KEY ("patron_id") REFERENCES patrons ("patron_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_tag_mapping" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id", "tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource the image belongs to */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the image */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of the image (e.g., cover, promotional) */,
  "image_description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  "image_size" INTEGER /* Size of the image file (e.g., in bytes) */,
  "image_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the image (e.g., 1920x1080) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_series" (
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each series */,
  "series_name" TEXT /* Name of the series */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the series */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_series_mapping" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource */,
  "series_id" INTEGER /* ID of the series */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id", "series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "subject_name" TEXT /* Name of the subject */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subject */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_subject_mapping" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id", "subject_id")
)
